title: Cobblemon Extended (LD16)
description: This modpack includes Cobblemon with a bunch of add-ons that I think make the Cobblemon experience richer and more immersive.
body:
This modpack was created specifically for me and my friends to experience the world of Cobblemon together. I will keep updating it as I keep finding new mods that enhance the experience. 

**Features:**

- Gyms and Gym Leaders + Other Notable Trainers: Adds a challenge to team building
- Legendary Structures
- Gravestones: Because nobody likes losing everything in a chill Pokemon game
- A mostly Pokemon world (except a select few other mobs)
- Backpacks and Bigger Storage: Because some people like to walk 30,000 blocks in 1 day
- Cobblemon Riding: Because some people don't like to _walk_ 30,000 blocks in 1 day
- Mega, Z-moves, Dynamax, and Terrastalisation through Cobblemon: Mega Showdown
- Pokemon show up on maps
- PokeNav to find your favorite Pokemon easier
- Terralith for cool terrain and Waystones (once again because some people walk 30,000 blocks away from their house)


**Notes for creating a Server:**

1. Set the `enable-command-block` property to true in `server.properties`. The Radical Cobblemon Structures and Legendary Structures datapacks use command blocks to spawn Gym Leaders and Legendary Pokemon in their respective structures.
2. The following pokemonRideConfig.json file adds the ability to ride more Pokemon with varying speeds and stamina. If creating a server, update the pokemonRideConfig.json in the world folder to: [pokemonRideConfig.json](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i7olgtgq0bs62q0fi8qzt/pokemonRideConfig.json?rlkey=tmt9otwbjfi5et7gmj7ippyhg&st=m92qtw72&dl=0)
3. For Vivillon Pride Patterns, it's made for 1.20.1 but works with 1.21.1 too. Put the file in both your resourcepacks folder and the world's datapacks folder.

**Other Notable Changes**

1. Over-levelling is enabled, and it is allowed to fight trainers with higher level pokemon than the original level caps. This modpack is designed for fun, and if you prefer to have level caps, you can either self-impose them or change the `initialLevelCap` property to `15` in `config/rctmod-server.toml`.
2. `MobsBeGone` is configured to remove all mobs except for a select few which are either important or whose drops cannot be acquired through Pokemon. Some important ones include the Wither and Wither Skeletons, Villagers, _Wandering Traders and Llamas (just because)_.
